summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gab44 V2 Admin Dashboard, Settings page, and Share Chart features. All major functionality working excellently including new user tier defaults, admin management capabilities, and enhanced user experience features.

integration_issues.issue: Copy link button text change detection had minor timing issue

passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 19 endpoints working (100% success rate)
New user registration defaults to 'advanced' subscription tier (CRITICAL REQUIREMENT)
Admin dashboard loads at /admin with complete stats display
Admin stats show: 21 Total Users, 40 Chat Messages, 9 Chat Sessions, 21 Advanced Users
Subscription breakdown correctly shows 21 users (100%) as Advanced tier
Sun sign distribution displayed with various zodiac signs
Admin users table displays all users with proper columns (User, Sun Sign, Birth Date, Tier, Joined)
User tier management dropdowns functional for admin use
Admin link visible and accessible in dashboard sidebar
Settings page loads with all required sections (Appearance, Notifications, Account, Subscription)
Theme toggle works perfectly in settings (Light/Dark mode switching)
Reading mode toggle functional with proper state management
Font size slider present and accessible
Notification toggles working for all categories
Account information displayed correctly in settings
Logout functionality available in settings
Share Chart page loads with beautiful chart preview
All social sharing options present (Share, Twitter, Facebook, Copy Link)
Chart preview displays cosmic blueprint with proper styling
Your Big Three section shows Sun (Gemini), Moon (Scorpio), Rising (Leo)
Invite friends section with shareable URL functionality
Copy link functionality works (with minor UI feedback timing issue)
Navigation between all pages works seamlessly
User authentication and session management working properly
Responsive design elements functioning well

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (25/26 major features working perfectly, 1 minor UI timing issue)
